title: GAO-02-322: SSA Disability Claims-Process Initiatives — Disappointing Results (2002)
description: U.S. Government Accountability Office report GAO-02-322 (published Feb 2002) reviewing the status and outcomes of five SSA initiatives intended to improve the disability claims process, finding the results disappointing amid growing DI/SSI backlogs. Documents SSA spending on caseload-management and automation initiatives and includes recommendations (with later implementation status) on hearings-backlog reduction and quality assurance. Relevant to understanding chronic DDS/SSA claims-processing backlog and reform history.

source.title: SSA Disability Decision Making: Additional Steps Needed to Ensure Accuracy and Fairness of Decisions over the Long Term (GAO-02-322)

notes: Authoritative: a published GAO report (product GAO-02-322; published Feb 04, 2002, publicly released Feb 27, 2002) mirrored from gao.gov. Markdown scrape captures Highlights plus the Recommendations table with agency-action implementation status. The source 'title' field uses GAO's catalog title; the filename slug ('disappointing-results') reflects the report's headline finding. Single publication year so temporal_coverage start==end (2002). Recommendation table is narrative, not a declared column schema.
